mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_RESTOCK_WAIT SET INBOUND_YN = 'Y', INBOUND_DT = #{processDt}, INBOUND_USER = #{processUser}, INBOUND_TIME = GETDATE(), UPDT_USER = #{processUser}, UPDT_TIME = GETDATE() WHERE TBL_RESTOCK_WAIT_ID = #{tblRestockWaitId}

UPDATE TBL_RESTOCK_WAIT SET INBOUND_YN = 'Y', INBOUND_DT = #{processDt}, INBOUND_USER = #{processUser}, INBOUND_TIME = GETDATE(), UPDT_USER = #{processUser}, UPDT_TIME = GETDATE() WHERE TBL_RESTOCK_WAIT_ID IN
#{id}
